# My Home Plan - Complete Site Information

> All your home services, one monthly plan. Serving the Okanagan Valley, BC.

My Home Plan is a monthly subscription platform that bundles home maintenance services into one affordable plan. Instead of hiring and managing multiple contractors, homeowners pay one monthly fee and we handle scheduling, vetting, quality assurance, and payment for all their home services. We serve 7 cities in BC's Okanagan Valley.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://myhomeplan.ca/): Main landing page with overview of the subscription service
- [How It Works](https://myhomeplan.ca/how-it-works): 4-step process - choose services, get matched with vetted contractors, scheduled maintenance year-round
- [Pricing](https://myhomeplan.ca/pricing): Transparent pricing with Essential, Complete, and Premium tiers. Monthly, quarterly (5% off), and annual (15% off) billing options
- [Plan Builder](https://myhomeplan.ca/plan-builder): Interactive tool to build a custom maintenance plan based on your home type and needs
- [Service Area](https://myhomeplan.ca/service-area): Interactive coverage map of the Okanagan Valley with city-specific information
- [FAQ](https://myhomeplan.ca/faq): Frequently asked questions for homeowners, strata councils, and contractors
- [For Homeowners](https://myhomeplan.ca/homeowners): Benefits including 20-40% savings vs hiring individually, vetted contractors, guaranteed scheduling
- [For Contractors](https://myhomeplan.ca/contractors): Join the network - zero cost, free leads, guaranteed payment within 7 days, keep 75% of service value
- [For Strata](https://myhomeplan.ca/strata): One contract, one invoice for strata building maintenance with dedicated account management
- [For Property Managers](https://myhomeplan.ca/property-managers): Centralized maintenance management across entire portfolios with volume pricing
- [Blog](https://myhomeplan.ca/blog): 60+ articles on home maintenance, seasonal checklists, cost guides, and Okanagan-specific tips
- [About](https://myhomeplan.ca/about): Company mission - making home maintenance simple, fair, and reliable
- [Contact](https://myhomeplan.ca/contact): Get in touch with the My Home Plan team

## Services Offered (32 Total)
Lawn mowing, snow removal, gutter cleaning, window cleaning, HVAC tune-ups, house cleaning, pest control, handyman services, pressure washing, tree trimming, garden maintenance, deck staining, driveway sealing, roof cleaning, deep cleaning, air duct cleaning, plumbing inspection, electrical inspection, water heater service, chimney sweep, appliance maintenance, dryer vent cleaning, sump pump maintenance, exterior caulking, spring cleanup, fall cleanup, lawn fertilization, irrigation maintenance, carpet cleaning, garage cleaning, organizing, junk removal.

## Pricing Details

### Suburban Homes
- Essentials: $89/month - Core seasonal services (lawn, snow, gutters, basic cleaning)
- Complete: $159/month - Full coverage including HVAC, pest control, handyman
- Premium: $249/month - Everything plus priority scheduling, emergency response, specialty services

### Townhomes
- Essentials: $69/month
- Complete: $119/month
- Premium: $189/month

### Condos
- Essentials: $49/month
- Complete: $99/month
- Premium: $149/month

### Billing Options
- Monthly: No contract, cancel anytime
- Quarterly: 5% discount, prepaid
- Annual: 15% discount, prepaid (refundable on prorated basis)

## Contractor Requirements
- BC business license
- $2M liability insurance
- WorkSafe BC coverage
- 3+ years experience
- Clean background check
- 2 professional references
- Probation period with quality monitoring

## Service Area
Okanagan Valley, British Columbia, Canada:
- Kelowna (primary hub)
- West Kelowna
- Vernon
- Penticton
- Lake Country
- Summerland
- Peachland

## Frequently Asked Questions

### For Homeowners
- What is My Home Plan? A monthly subscription service bundling all home maintenance into one plan.
- How much does it cost? Plans start at $89/month for Essentials. Complete starts at $159/month, Premium at $249/month.
- Can I cancel anytime? Monthly plans are month-to-month with no contract. Quarterly and annual plans are refundable on a prorated basis.
- How are contractors vetted? Business license check, $2M liability insurance, WorkSafe BC, background check, reference check, and probation period.
- What if I'm not happy? 100% quality guarantee - we'll send another contractor to redo it at no cost.
- What areas do you serve? Kelowna, West Kelowna, Vernon, Penticton, Lake Country, Summerland, and Peachland.

### For Strata Councils
- How does strata pricing work? Per-unit per month, based on services selected and building size.
- Can the strata council approve the plan? Yes, we provide detailed proposals for council meetings.
- What about emergency repairs? Mid-size and large plans include emergency response coverage.

### For Contractors
- Is there a cost to join? Zero cost - no fees for leads, listings, or advertising.
- How much do I get paid? Contractors keep 75% of service value, paid within 7 days via direct deposit.
- Do I have to accept every job? No, you set your availability and can accept or decline any job.
